allow: Bash(export PATH="$PATH:/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI" && "/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" auth status 2>&1)
Bash(echo "" | "/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" auth login --web -p https 2>&1)

Bash("/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" repo create Aquaware-Website-V3 --public --description "AquaWare - Next-Gen Water Quality Management Platform | Data-driven platform for controlling indirect industrial discharges" --source "D:/AquaWare Website V3" --remote origin --push 2>&1)
Bash(cd "D:/AquaWare Website V3" && npm run dev 2>&1)

Bash("/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" repo create Aquaware-Website-V4 --public --description "AquaWare V4 - Clean, minimal, light aquatic water quality management platform" --source "D:/AquaWare Website V3" --remote v4 --push 2>&1)
Bash(cd "D:/AquaWare Website V3" && npm run build 2>&1)
Bash(cd "D:/AquaWare Website V3" && npm install --save-dev gh-pages 2>&1)
Bash(cd "D:/AquaWare Website V3" && npm run build 2>&1 && cp dist/index.html dist/404.html)
